title: Spectrophotometric Determination of lodochloro· hydroxyquinoline in Multicomponent Pharmaceutjcal Formulations especially in Presence of Diiodohydroxyquinoline
author: G. PODDAR
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
School of Tropical Medicine, Department of Chemistry, Calcutta-700 078 

 Central Public Health and Drugs Laboratory, Calcutta 700 015 
 Manuscript received 23 March 1988, revised 4 July 1988, accepted 20 September 1988  

 A spectrophotometrlc method for the estimation of lodochlorohydroxyquinoline based on the quantitative uv absorbtion maximum at 267 nm of its solution in 3 N  HCL is described.
